retrieval.vectorContext:
Issue: Mild Acid Reflux During Training - Mild - Gastrointestinal. Constraints: Foods to avoid (Very spicy pre-workout meals, Large carbonated drinks before training), Exercises to avoid (Heavy lifting immediately after a large meal)
Issue: Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease - Mild - Gastrointestinal. Constraints: Foods to avoid (Very spicy pre-workout meals), Exercises to avoid (Heavy lifting immediately after large meals, Decline bench work after eating)
Issue: Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease - Moderate - Gastrointestinal. Constraints: Foods to avoid (Very spicy pre-workout meals), Exercises to avoid (Heavy lifting immediately after large meals, High-pressure belt use after heavy meals, Decline bench work after eating)
